title: Assistant Task Record Schema V1
description: JSON Schema for task records tracked by the assistant domain's task_tracker.

intent_type.description: The intent category that created this task.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the task.

turn_count.description: Number of turns spent on this task.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp when the task was created.

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp of the last status update.
